abdomen"},{"name":"5","value":"5","definition":"Bulging; Fat is bulging slightly above the furculum and the fat under the wing and on the abdomen is well mounded"},{"name":"6","value":"6","definition":"Greatly bulging; Fat is bulging greatly above the furculum and large mounds of fat occur under the wings and on the
